prompts.prompt: What is the current YES price and implied probability on the 'Will Zohran Mamdani become President of the United States before 2045?' event on Kalshi?
List every candidate currently listed under the 'Who will the next Pope be?' event (KXNEWPOPE-70) on Kalshi with each outcome's YES price and implied probability.
What is the current bid-ask spread in cents on the 'Will OpenAI or Anthropic IPO first?' market (event KXOAIANTH-40) on Kalshi?
List every available market category on Kalshi right now.
Find all active Kalshi markets in the Elections category with YES implied probability between 10% and 40% and 24h volume above $10,000, ranked by 24h volume.

For the 'Who will be the next Prime Minister of the UK?' event (KXNEXTUKPM-30), which candidate sub-market currently has the tightest bid-ask spread relative to its midpoint, and what is that spread in cents?
Using 1-hour candlesticks over the last 7 days, identify the largest single-day YES-price move (in cents) on the 'Will SpaceX land anything successfully on Mars before 2030?' event (KXSPACEXMARS-30).
Screen the Kalshi Economics category for active markets whose orderbook depth can absorb a $5,000 YES order at <= 2 cents of slippage, and list the top 5 by available depth.

For 'When will any company achieve AGI?' (event KXAGICO-COMP), list each year-bucket sub-market with its current YES price, and report the cumulative implied probability that any company achieves AGI before 2030.

Compare the current YES prices and orderbook liquidity across the top 5 candidates in the 'Who will be the next new Speaker of the House?' event (KXNEXTSPEAKER-31) on Kalshi, and identify which candidate's pricing looks most out of line relative to its liquidity.

Compare 30-day YES-price trajectories on 'Will OpenAI or Anthropic IPO first?' (KXOAIANTH-40) and 'Will Ramp or Brex IPO first?' (KXRAMPBREX-40). Which event has re-priced more over the last 30 days, in which direction, and by how many cents?

For the 'Who will be the world's first trillionaire?' event (KXTRILLIONAIRE-30), pick the 3 highest-24h-volume contenders and compare YES-initiated vs NO-initiated taker volume over the last 24 hours. Which contender is seeing the strongest YES-side aggression?
prompts.alphaCategory: Trade-tape sentiment skew (YES- vs NO-initiated flow)

prompts.prompt: For the 'Who will be named as Xi Jinping's successor?' event (KXXISUCCESSOR-45JAN01), identify the candidate sub-market that best combines high 24h volume, tight bid-ask spread, and positive 7-day YES-price drift. Which successor is the 'smart-money plus momentum' pick right now?

Using only Kalshi data, find any candidate sub-market inside 'Who will be the next Prime Minister of the UK?' (KXNEXTUKPM-30) where best YES-ask + best NO-ask is strictly less than 100 cents (implied within-leg arbitrage). Report the leg, the YES-ask, the NO-ask, and the arbitrage edge in cents.

For 'How many executive orders will Trump sign in his second term?' (event KXEOTRUMPTERM-29JAN20), compute the market-implied expected value (weighted mean of each bucket's midpoint using current YES prices as probabilities) and report how that expected value has moved over the last 30 days.

Build a risk-diversified 5-market Kalshi shortlist of actively trading contracts priced between 15% and 40% YES where each market (a) has orderbook depth sufficient for a $2,500 YES position at <= 3 cents of slippage and (b) has 7-day cumulative volume >= $50K. The shortlist must include at least one market from Elections, one from Economics, and one from Science and Technology.

Across all sub-markets of 'What will be the largest source of global primary energy consumption in 2030?' (KXPRIMEENGCONSUMPTION-30), check whether the sum of best YES-ask implied probabilities equals 100 cents. If it does not, identify which outcome(s) are mispriced and quantify the total edge in cents.

Identify the 3 Kalshi markets closing within the next 14 days with (a) cumulative 30-day volume > $100K and (b) the largest absolute gap between current YES midpoint and the 30-day implied-probability moving average. Report each market's current price, 30-day mean, gap in cents, and direction (rich vs cheap vs mean).
